title: Blackspur BB-GP302 Decorator's Aluminium Oxide Finishing Paper
features: Ideal for creating a superior finish on wood, metal, plastics and painted surfaces before applying primer, undercoat or varnishes

description: Product Description Blackspur aluminium oxide finishing paper is suitable for hand or machine use. It is ideal for creating a superior finish on wood, metal, plastics and painted surfaces before applying primer, undercoat or varnishes. Measures 10m length by 115mm width. 120 grade. Supplied in shrink wrapped with colour insert. Supplying quality products. One of the most comprehensive ranges of hand tools and DIY associated products in the UK. Box Contains 1x Finishing Paper
